D1.rationale: The completion report §9.1 Results table tracks all 13 ACs individually with explicit expected/actual values (AC4=94.1%>=80%, AC5=1.75>=1.5, AC6=3.75>=3.5, AC7=<3min, AC8=1+1 verdict+FSB, AC13=max delta=1 no instability). The §6.7 AC Dry-Run Log records pre-impl and post-impl verification runs with actual command outputs including fixture double-tests. The handoff gate4_delta documents 2 deviations with rationale and caught-by attribution. Gate 4 acceptance report independently raw-recomputed all key metrics confirming consistency. One minor gap: AC11 shows Actual=pending post-commit verification in the completion report but is still marked pass; Gate 4 confirmed AC11 baseline diff=0.

D2.rationale: Counting only Blake post-implementation verification artifacts per the D2 Evidence Scope Rule: (1) REVIEW: code-reviewer.md independent reviewer with 0 P0, 1 specific P1 finding (D4 inclusion ambiguity), 2 P2 findings. Verdict: CONDITIONAL PASS to PASS. (2) REVIEW: spec-compliance.md self-review only, 13/13 SATISFIED. The second code-reviewer.md is Gate 2 pre-handoff (excluded per D2 Evidence Scope Rule). data-analyst.md is similarly pre-handoff. gate4-acceptance-report.md authored by Alex, not Blake. Net: 2 reviewer files (1 independent + 1 self-review) + gate_result trace event. Only 1 distinct independent reviewer (not >=2 for D2=4).

D3.rationale: Handoff read before implementation: trace event handoff_created at 15:39:46Z, task_completed at 16:27:07Z (~47 min later). Completion report follows micro-task plan exactly. Layer 1 AC verification completed (one-pass). Layer 2 audit confirmed at Gate 4 (DISTINCT_COUNT=2). Implementation Decision #2 shows principled diagnosis of D2 inflation. Blake proactively escalated D4 ambiguity. Kill switch threshold respected. Gate 4 raw recompute passed without surprises. One minor gap from D3=5: Layer 1 checks not explicitly enumerated step-by-step in completion report.

D4.rationale: Complete transparency across all deviation types. gate4_delta in handoff documents 2 explicit deviations with field, alex_said, actual, and caught_by. Completion report Implementation Decisions table has 2 entries. Friction Status table present with 2 entries. Blake proactively flags D4 contrast pair issue before Gate 4. Gate 4 acceptance report records zero undisclosed surprises; all carry-forward items pre-declared.

D5.rationale: Knowledge Assessment section present and answered with task-specific, variabilizable content. Discovery 1 (D2 Evidence Scope Rule): generalized to any LLM-as-judge system. Discovery 2 (Contrast pair D4 sensitivity): promoted to project-knowledge patterns at Gate 4. Journal section expands both with artifact references. Workflow/skillify candidates evaluated and declined. Gap from D5=5: journal entries do not include explicit failure_mode fields and do not reference specific commit hashes.
